item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i see brains
there goes my friday night
i guess
looks kinda shady
i'm hoping the picture is unrelated
it was me.. weird fetish
so it was bunk viagra
what could go wrong?
not bad
severely hard
wait what
that kid is cooler than i'll ever be
(Judge is 6'7")
patrick bateman
good to know?
amen brother
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Friday HILARIOUS MEME Dump To Help You End The Week With A Giggle #831
item.description:
1. Gimme your best advice in the comments!
2. A masterpiece
3. Maan, I know that we imgurians are just bunch of weirdos, and I would still consider people who are in astrology to be even bigger weirdos. Like no star 3000 lights years is controlling whether you are trustworthy... like wtf? How does this even make sense>!>!
4. Instructions clear: pumped up the Jam
5
6
7. People: so what do you do when you're alone Introverts:
8
9. New Drake diss just dropped
10. She must be getting a lot of tips ;)
12. This is straight out of a cartoon. (glad the little guy is okay)
13. Merlin got them moves
14. Beer tax
15. Special announcement today: The RELEASE DATE for my wacky first person narrative game will be APRIL 16 2025. Little less than 3 weeks! :) Been working for 2 years on this game and recent playtests have been very good (except one 13 year old playtester, who just couldn't understand where to go). If you would like to help create some more hype for this weirdo indie game, please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Fiship Friday
item.dc:creator: ShoemakerThe

item.title: We set up Kitty Hospice for my sweet elder baby
item.description:
Shes checking out her new space. She seems happy to be away from the other cats and have her things so close. The room is her daddy’s office so it smells like him and she has one of his shirts. You know, I’ve had her since I was 17 and feed, water, and clean her but HE is her favorite.
She’s been getting confused and she’s starting to lose her vision. I don’t want her in large spaces unless I can monitor her.
I am hoping she’ll pass in her sleep cozy at home. She still purrs when I pet her, loves food, and can still hop up on things. If she seems to not be enjoying life anymore, I’ll take her in. Her name is Miguela and she’ll be 20 this year. She’s been the bestest kitty.
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: This is good!
item.description: As someone who uses AI daily (concept and personal work) this is a great step! I personally love AI when it is not treated like a corporate greed money pit. I always recommend ethical AI (which there are only 2 currently) that allows you to make your own training data. Stable Diffusion is the only one I WILL mention right now. AI SHOULD NOT be able to be under copyright protection. This is a single step forward for all backwards ass bullshit happening in the US. You guys probably have seen my view on it, that it should be a tool, not and end all tactic. https://petapixel.com/2025/03/19/us-court-of-appeals-unanimously-denies-copyright-protection-for-ai-created-images/
item.dc:creator: MrIndubitably101

item.title: Being a Jew in America right now is so bizarre.
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Can't take the DEI out of CO
item.description:
We gots legislation to protect black history. https://www.chalkbeat.org/colorado/2025/02/21/bill-would-create-black-history-standards-for-schools-amid-dei-attacks/
We gots legislation to help sick and disabled students get through school. https://leg.colorado.gov/bills/sb25-087#:~:text=The%20bill%20requires%20each%20institution,self%2Ddisclose%20the%20student's%20disability Meanwhile, in D.C.,
https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/1282 Motherfucker... all your flagged DEI words are just a list of Colorado's government agencies and academic departments. We're more likely to constitutionalize "DEI" than rename every government related organization in the state. Efficiency... you keep on using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means. ?
Hello from the Void. *Edit for sauce links
item.dc:creator: currentlywithoutimagination

item.title: REPORT: US administration could argue 'Alien Enemies Act' allows ICE to enter homes without warrant.
item.description:
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/reichlinmelnick.bsky.social/post/3lktf327lvc2f Source without paywall: https://archive.is/tNBDe I mean do I have to say anything else? They're deporting innocent people to El Salvador. See here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fZXS-BerWz0 At the time of this post, so far the UK, Canada and Germany have all issued warnings to their citizens to NOT travel to the US if at all possible, and if you do go there, be certain to closely monitor your Visa status, have appropriate identification and so forth. Personally, I'd just stay the fuck out until this mess is sorted.
To Imgurians, please give the yanks some ideas on how to boycott the Heritage Foundation, Fox News and other alt-right nutters.
Finally, a little something uplifting and inspiring.
May he and Thiel have their fake exteriors completely ripped away to reveal them for the bloodthirsty lizards that they are.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: We made an Atlantis live action TRAILER
item.description:
This project took about 14 months to make (not a drop of AI in the film) I'm a director / VFX artist and this has been my baby for the better part of last year!
I'm a MASSIVE fan of the original and am so thrilled to be able to share this piece with the world finally. Our cast was so incredibly commited to stepping into the shoes of these timeless characters.
We made this thing with our own money and a prayer (for real). Our small crew had an amazing time during production and I wanted to jump on and share their incredible work with my imgur family!!
Most if not all VFX was composed by yours truly with the help of one of my firneds from college who also happends to be my room mate and our extremely talented cinematographer...
I greatest hope is that you find as much joy watching this as we had while making it! This was a true dream project that was created for everyone to enjoy whether you're a fan of the original film or not!
ALSO during our premiere we were blessed to be joined by the original writer of the animated film Tab Murphy and one of the director's Kirk Wise. It meant the world that they came out to show their support for our small LA premiere. Just goes to show that they still have such a burning affection for this movie they created nearly 25 years ago. If you liked this story, you're sure to enjoy watching the trailer itself!! You can watch it on YouTube now! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=66o3_HsjpyY
item.dc:creator: jmunoz
